name: dev-workflows
description: Full product-development lifecycle workflow skills for GitHub Copilot CLI: idea → create-vi → create-ard → specify → design → epics → implement → document → release-notes → ready, plus vuln (CVE remediation), upgrade (dependency upgrades), api-guideline-reviewer, guideline-reviewer, docs-profile, feedback, and prompt utilities. Strong-tier model routing (Opus 4.8/4.7/4.6 or GPT-5.5), branch management, dispatched Opus/GPT-5.5 review sub-agents, and automated maintenance. 19 user-facing skills + 30 sub-agents.
